LanguageData.Ammo_AntiMateriel_FMJ.label: anti-materiel cartridge (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_AntiMateriel_FMJ.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_AntiMateriel_Incendiary.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_AntiMateriel_HE.description: Large caliber bullet used by heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles.
